_note: ⚠️  DEPRECATED PATH. Pentacad initially defined 'V2-50CHB' and 'V2-50CHK' as sub-variants. After inspecting the Kinetic Control v5.8.4 disk image + the PocketNC/Settings GitHub repo, NO such variants exist. The real PocketNC product line is: V1 (boardRevision v1revH), V2-10 (v2revP), V2-50 (v2revR), Solo (separate SKU). This file is kept ONLY for URL stability; it now redirects to machines/v2-50/.
deprecationReason: CHB variant was a fabrication from earlier session; not in Pentamachine's actual product line.
_action: To remove this folder cleanly: rm -rf machines/v2-50-chb
